llm_instruction: Use this file only after a candidate job was selected. Copy the BASF URL exactly from job.url; never construct job links.

job.title: Regional Product Manager
job.description: M ain Areas of Responsibilities and Key Activities Product Portfolio Management : Develop and implement technology toolbox to optimize products, drive consolidation, and facilitate knowledge sharing among countries. Steward project proposals and manage PhaseGate projects. Strategic Marketing Projects : Lead marketing initiative for the Indian automotive market focused on profitable and sustainable growth. Conduct market analysis, optimize technology portfolios, and develop tailored product offerings. Pricing Management : Define and implement regional pricing policies, propose pricing actions, and ensure adherence to KAM Business Rules for margin management. Strategy Development : Build regional strategies for different coatings layers, define milestones, and promote collaboration across countries. Business Development : Act as the key contact for 2W accounts, identify opportunities, and support business restructuring efforts. Sales and Key Account Management : Drive growth and optimize sales turnover in the 2W segment, identifying areas for improvement and monitoring product performance. Recommend enhancements to sales and distribution efficiency in line with regional strategies. Cross functional Collaboration with Customization Lab, global /regional Product Management, Technical Project management, Supply Chain, and Key Account Managers to ensure short- and long-term growth and profitability improvements across all coatings layers Localization - Evaluate implement localization of critical raw materials Define organic measures for complexity reduction and profitability improvement, e.g. introduction of local sourcing, toll manufacturing of finished goods, raw materials and intermediates, consolidation of RMs/intermediates/Finished goods technologies etc. Collaborate with Labs Key Accounts Management for Introduction and Implementation of new products and technology like High Solids, low-cost mono coats Job Skills: 1. Should be able to collaborate with region and global teams based on project needs 2. Should be able to think strategically for the division to lay out plans for future growth and profitability, and execute them 3. Product knowledge; Knowledge of application technique, commercial acumen 4. Communication Collaboration skills 5. Investment and R D project business case preparation Job Requirements (m inimum requirement to carry out the work) Edu c a t i o n Incumbent should be preferably a postgraduate (Chemicals or related field) A degree in...
